name: analysing-heap-dumps
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for Analysing Heap Dumps by John Neerdael

plugins.name: analysing-heap-dumps
plugins.description: Investigate .hprof files (Android or JVM heap dumps), diagnose memory leaks, find what holds an over-allocated class or specific object id, measure GC churn between two snapshots, or chase OutOfMemoryError. Wraps heaptrail with auto-install instructions.
